What is Pay on Delivery (Cash/Card)?
Pay on Delivery (Cash/Card) payment method includes Cash on Delivery (COD) as well as Debit card / Credit card / Net banking payments at your doorstep.
Top Brand
Top Brand indicates high quality, trusted brands on Amazon aggregated basis verified ratings, returns/refunds and recent order history at brand level.
Services Available
Service support is available with the product to make it ready to use. Service applicable on the product can be availed on the product detail page or during checkout. For Brand provided services, we will notify the brand once the product is delivered. Brand will subsequently contact to you to schedule the service. For paid services by Brands like AC installation the charges need to be paid directly to the brand technician we will initiate the request on your behalf

All services are listed below
  • Free installation and demo on Televisions. **Installation at the time of delivery available in select pincodes View details.Wall mount brackets are chargeable if not included in the box along with the TV
  • Free Phone set-up service at the time of delivery is available in select regions. This can be availed during checkout by selecting a time slot that mentions "with setup".View details
  • Free installation on Washing Machines and Refrigerator
  • Paid Installations for Air Conditioners and Chimneys. For Brand provided AC installations, service charges will have to be paid to the brand technician directly
  • Free assembly services for Furniture items requiring professional assembly
  • Paid set-up service on Laptops and SSD
  • Installation/Assembly &/or Set-up services are also available on Dishwashers, Security cameras, Cycles, Inverters, Soundbars
  • Automotive support: Tyre installation, Engine oil change, Brake disk replacement etc. available in select pincodes
Learn more
Service support is available along with product purchase for your convenience.

Many Brands provide the service themselves. For brand provided services we register a service request with the brand once the product is delivered. There might be additional charges in some cases for the services availed. Read more on Brand provided services

Product Description

Crucial RAM 8GB DDR4 3200MHz CL22 (or 2933MHz or 2666MHz) Laptop Memory CT8G4SFRA32A

CT8G4SFRA32A is an 8GB DDR4 notebook module that operates at speeds up to 3200 MT/s and has a CL22 latency. It is an Unbuffered SODIMM. It conforms to the industry standard DDR4 SODIMM layout of 260 pins and is compatible with systems that take DDR4 3200 MT/s SODIMM memory.

RAM Memory

  • ECC Type Non-ECC, Form Factor SODIMM, Pin Count 260-pin, PC Speed PC4-25600, Voltage 12V, Rank and Configuration 1Rx16, 1Rx8 or 2Rx8.NOTE: DRAM modules require configuration to specific systems.

Improve your system's responsiveness, run apps faster and multitask with ease. Extended timings - 22-22-22

Install with ease; no computer skills are required How-to guides are available at Crucial.

Compatibility when using the Crucial System Scanner or Crucial Advisor Tool.

  • Micron quality and reliability are backed by superior component and module level testing and 42 years of memory expertise.

RAM 8GB

    How are ratings calculated?
    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.
    Sponsored

    Customers say

    Customers find the RAM delivers a significant performance boost for multitasking and works well with various systems, including HP 15, asus f510ua, and HP Fr4000 tu. The memory is easy to install and offers good value for money, with one customer noting it provides the best performance at its price point. Customers appreciate its authenticity as a genuine product and its suitability for gaming, with one mentioning it handles high-end games well. While many customers report no issues, some mention their RAM became faulty within six months of use.

      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      I recently purchased this RAM stick from the official store via Amazon, and I’m extremely satisfied with the overall experience and performance. The installation process was very smooth the RAM fit perfectly into my laptop’s motherboard, and the alignment and connection felt secure and effortless. Even if you’re not very technical, upgrading with this RAM is quite easy.

      In terms of compatibility, it worked flawlessly with my laptop, as the format and specifications were fully supported by my motherboard. The clock speed is impressive and delivers consistent, stable performance without any issues.

      What really stands out is the performance boost, especially for editing tasks.

      Highly recommended!!!

    • Dhruv Garg
      5 out of 5 stars
      Solid Performance & upgrade
      Reviewed in India on 6 November 2024
      Size: 8GBStyle Name: 3200 MT/sPattern Name: 8GB DDR4
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      I bought the Crucial 16GB DDR4 3200 MHz RAM to boost my laptop’s performance, and I’m really happy with it! My laptop used to lag whenever I had too many tabs or apps open, but after installing this memory, everything ran noticeably smoother. Multitasking feels faster, and programs load without that annoying delay I was used to.

      Pros

      Smooth Performance: My laptop is much quicker now, especially when multitasking. It handles Photoshop and multiple Chrome tabs with ease.

      Easy Installation: Installation was a breeze. I watched a quick video, and it was installed in about 10 minutes.

      Great Value: For the price, this RAM upgrade offers excellent

      Cons

      Slightly Higher CAS Latency (CL22): It’s not the fastest on the market, but honestly, I didn’t notice a big difference for regular tasks.

      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.

      Review for Laptop RAM Upgrade

      Pros: As a first-time upgrader, I successfully installed this RAM in my HP 14s FQ1089AU laptop without any issues. The installation process was straightforward, and the RAM is fully compatible, seamlessly integrating with my system. The performance tab in my laptop’s settings clearly displays the upgraded RAM status. Post-installation, I’ve noticed a significant boost in my laptop’s performance, with smoother operation and faster response times.

      Cons: Initially, I was apprehensive about compatibility and whether the RAM would function properly, but these concerns were quickly alleviated after a smooth installation and flawless performance.

      Overall: This RAM upgrade is an excellent choice for enhancing laptop performance. It is user-friendly, compatible, and delivers noticeable improvements. I highly recommend it to anyone looking to boost their device’s efficiency.
